title: helianthus × cinereus
intro: Helianthus × cinereus, also known as Silverleaf Sunflower, is a sterile hybrid plant that combines the characteristics of the Sunflower (Helianthus annuus) and the Silverleaf Sunflower (Helianthus cinereus). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat wounds, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The health benefits of Helianthus × cinereus include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and provide antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its therapeutic benefits.
